title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you simple questions about yourself, your daily life and your preferences. Answer naturally and try to give complete answers.

phases.name: Personal Information
questions: Where do you live or come from?
Do you work or are you a student?
What do you do or study?

phases.name: Daily Life and Preferences
questions: Which day of the week do you like the most? Why?
What did you do yesterday evening or last weekend?
Do you think that English will be useful for you in the future? Why or why not?
Tell us about the people you live with.
What kind of websites do you like? Why?
Which do you prefer, the morning or the afternoon? Why?
What kind of films do you like?
What's your favourite type of music? Why?
